hypotheses.name: Single-founder weak segment hypothesis

segments.name: Founder workspace
segments.description: All documents traceable to a single founder operator.

hypotheses.agreement_summary: Layer 1 is shallow with very few documents; Layer 2 produced one cluster only.
hypotheses.divergence_summary: Layer 3 lacks enough entities to support meaningful community detection.
hypotheses.narrative_argument_for: A founder-stage org commonly presents as one cohesive workspace.
hypotheses.narrative_argument_against: A single segment is barely distinguishable from the undifferentiated whole.

hypotheses.name: Null hypothesis: undifferentiated whole
hypotheses.narrative_argument_for: Corpus is small (<50 docs); no statistically meaningful partition is recoverable.
hypotheses.narrative_argument_against: Even a small corpus may show one informal segment if leadership is divided.
